metadata.purpose: Config-driven quality gate + budgets for the personalized opportunity teaser. Editable here — never hard-coded in components. Separate from the existing delivery-message quality gate (webex/messageQuality) which continues to guard Circuit Stage D full messages.

delivery_message.purpose: Concise, action-first Webex/Outlook message budget + gate. The push message is a nudge to act with an internal coordination plan (your move + who to loop in + the customer step) — the full MEDDPICC/decision-packet detail lives in the app, not the notification. Circuit Stage D and the deterministic builder both target this budget.
